creator: fran@reyes.somos.net
text:
Add note about Softupdate moved to /sys/ufs/ufs

Fix: 

> 20000621:
>	Softupdates are now part of the main tree. If you have been
>	using them you need to remove the links at /usr/src/ufs/ffs.
>	The two links that need to be deleted are softdep.h and
>	ffs_softdep.h.
>
